one_line_description: B2B data waterfall API aggregating 30+ vendors for contact/company enrichment, email verification, phone numbers, prospecting, and job-change tracking.
auth_summary: API key passed in an 'x-api-key' header on every request, confirmed in the official docs at docs.waterfall.io.
access_notes: Public docs exist (docs.waterfall.io/v1/introduction) but neither the docs nor the homepage state how keys are issued; the site funnels visitors to 'Book a Call'. A third-party review claims every user gets an API key on signup, but I could not verify a self-serve signup flow from official sources.
api_surface_summary: REST API at api.waterfall.io with ~13 endpoints: prospector, contact/company search, contact/company/phone enrichment, email verification, job-change detection, and account/usage reporting; mixes sync and async (webhook-result) operations.
main_blocker: Credential acquisition path is unverified — marketing funnels to a demo call, and pricing/credit terms are not public.
agent_notes: Docs are real and reasonably complete (fetched the introduction page: REST, x-api-key, 13 endpoints, llms.txt index), which is better than expected for a thin-docs candidate. Main gaps: no public pricing, no confirmed self-serve signup, no MCP found. Cargo's integration docs reference an 'x-waterfall-api-key' header variant for their connector.
